title: 🦘 Light At The End Of The Housing Tunnel? Chalmers Rings RBA Alarm Bell, Star Suspended from ASX
description: Australian house prices are still on the rise, with a 0.5% bump in August marking the 19th month of increases in CoreLogic's Home Value Index. However, the rapid growth is beginning to slow down, with average home values now sitting at about $802,357.
author: Outback Briefs

title: 🦘 Inflation Continues To Fall, Petrol Prices Getting Cheaper, Woolworths Strives To Battle Price Gouger Image
description: Australian inflation might be cooling off, but the RBA isn't going soft just yet. Fresh data for July shows inflation nudged down to 3.5% from 3.8% - still a hair above what the experts predicted.
author: Outback Briefs

title: 🦘 Home Loan Rate Cuts Begin, Employee Disengagement Concerning Aussie Businesses, ANZ In Hot Water From APRA
description: Westpac has just joined NAB in trimming interest rates on their fixed-rate home loans, and experts reckon more banks could follow suit. Looks like the RBA might potentially be ready to trim the official cash rate (most banks are predicting some time next year).
author: Outback Briefs
